summary.verification_method: HTTP HEAD for V1/V2 corpus; GitHub Search API for new repos (only live, non-archived, non-fork, >=2 stars returned)
notes: 563 repos from V1/V2 list, HTTP-verified live on 2026-06-13
437 additional repos from GitHub Search API across 17 topic queries + keyword queries
Selection criterion for new repos: most-recently-pushed first, then highest stars
All repos: not archived, not forks, >=2 stars, currently reachable
